title: Admissions: Military Dependents
description: Conroe ISD welcomes students from military families and has specific enrollment procedures in place to make their transition into district schools as smooth as possible. The policy outlines how the district handles enrollment for children of active-duty military personnel, including flexible requirements for records, immunizations, and placement that recognize the unique challenges military families face when relocating. Parents in military families can rely on these guidelines to understand what to expect when enrolling their child, even if all standard documentation is not immediately available.
